text: Inside this space, flooded with artificial light and filled with the ambient glow of digital screens, I am caught between anticipation and contemplation. The bold declaration of "R+D" on the wall hints at progress and probing curiosity. Everything here is designed to stimulate thought and inquiry, inviting me to participate in the evolving dance between humanity and technology. I feel a spark of excitement, cushioned by an undercurrent of uncertainty—each innovation a question as much as an answer. Here, I am both observer and participant in the unfolding story of research and discovery.
